data.body: Fix Foolery so Knots profile state-level owners from kno profile list are preserved in runtime ownership derivation. Current bug: a knot can advance from planning to ready_for_plan_review with agent-owned queue state in Knots, but Foolery collapses ownership to the broader plan_review step and marks requiresHumanAction=true, which stops autonomous execution after planning. Investigate and patch the Knots adapter/runtime, add regression tests, and do not move the knot to a terminal state without explicit user instruction.
data.title: Honor Knots state owners in runtime queue ownership
